programmes.show_description: A writer and his girlfriend stumble into a graveyard ruled by the Dark Master, forced to witness eerie undead rituals that blur the line between horror, desire, and the bizarre.
Richard Latto presents alternative anthems from a music community with attitude.
In Hotel Amigo, LOS AMIGOS play dance music in a run-down hotel-but in their breaktime dreams, dancers transform, fantasy reigns, and music unlocks a world beyond reality.
Helen is unnerved by a traumatic start to her working day. Henry is happy to be courted by a rival broadcaster - will he make a marriage made in TV heaven?
Gus is eager to impress a Japanese delegation of potential financiers; the news staffers are introduced to the novel concept of religious belief, except for George.
Richard Latto presents alternative anthems from a music community with attitude.
Jack Hargreaves celebrates rural England, blending folklore, crafts, and gentle storytelling as Hargreaves explores vanishing traditions, landscapes, and the quiet wisdom of country life.
A chemist is accused of the murder of his fiancé's stepfather, who was determined to keep the two apart.
Betty is being tormented by apparent hallucinations, latest is a "singing violin." Her stepfather tells her fiance there can be no wedding because she is going to be declared insane.
Millicent Channing comes to Holmes asking help to find her fiance that disappeared
Fred snoops on a rival to learn who has a big contract and uncovers staff moonlighting.
A council battle escalates while factory tensions flare, forcing Fred to fight on two fronts.
Wedding plans bring fresh headaches for Fred as work troubles refuse to wait.
Smellie is in the hospital, and the lads pay a reluctant visit, navigating their mixed feelings along the way.
Heavy Breathing meets a well-to-do ex school friend in the café and feels ashamed that he is less educated and decides it's time to get some private tuition.
Eric is so captivated by a girl at the bus stop that he misses his bus and is late for work, right when Bloody Delilah is conducting a time-and-motion study on the Thunderbird 3 crew.
A proton storm drives Nemesis back to Medusa with Liz and Rudi as hostages. Fulvia tries to reach Earth for Adam, but the storm diverts her ship. Will Adam come to their aid?
As Shem repairs her ship, Fulvia tests a human thought-transfer machine like Medusas, but it malfunctions, causing her pain and distress. Can anyone save her in time?
Hostage Dr. Rudi Schmidt is forced into menial labour on Medusas surface and in the city. He rebels, inspiring other men, but is caught and placed under Lizs supervision.
The Champions have to race against time when London is threatened with devastation by a criminal organisation who have stolen a nuclear submarine with live devices on board.
Harry and Ken move to Nottingham. Ken works as a bodyguard for a radio DJ, while Harry goes into partnership with a widow to run a country club.

programmes.show_name: The Prime of Miss Jean Brodie
programmes.show_description: Graceless, unkempt Mary is the opposite of the girls Miss Brodie cultivates. Nevertheless, when Miss Brodie learns about Mary, she decides to take her under her wing.
Terror from a doomed planet - a planet of death, despite advanced scientific knowledge, but a new life for a beautiful girl who has learned the secrets of molecular transformation.
Humans from another planet, frozen for 300 years, are recovered and revived.

Wedding plans bring fresh headaches for Fred as work troubles refuse to wait.
Romantic complications begin to mount.
Jane confronts unresolved issues.
Jane faces changes that could reshape her future.
Harry and Ken move to Nottingham. Ken works as a bodyguard for a radio DJ, while Harry goes into partnership with a widow to run a country club.
A minicab driver's fortunes change when he meets a beautiful stranger. Guest starring Lee Evans and Serena Scott Thomas.
Two hitchhikers modeling at a creepy English manor become trapped by a witches coven devoted to ritual sex and sacrifice. Once rejected by British censors, Virgin Witch became a cult erotic horror!
An aged vampire uses seductive vampiric women posing as sex workers to lure men to his lair. When their commander vanishes, two macho Navy sailors fall into the deadly trap.

The beginnings of the Glastonbury Fayre which was in its second year in 1971 and very much rooted in the culture of peace and love.

Alex Dyke presents an hour of bubblegum pop and cheesy tracks to make you feel good.
Sherlock Holmes helps one of Dr. Watson's old friends by explaining the source of an odd noise in the man's home, but in doing so Holmes uncovers a more serious mysterry.
Sherlock Holmes helps Scotland Yard to track down a killer who has been leaving three thistles next to each of the women he has murdered.
Francis Coudrill presents a unique blend of animation and the European Western in this TV classic as Hank Rides Again. 6/13

A new opportunity with an Eastern connection tempts Fred along with new risks.
Fred quits and plans a new life abroad; the workers take over, but can the factory survive?
Cheese and Egg's mate has passed away, which makes him turn from his life of sin. The lads unsuccessfully try to tempt him back to his old ways.

Though Liz excels as a Medusan ship captain, her attitude toward men causes concern. Octavia orders tests to learn why Liz isnt attracted to Medusan men.
Adam and Shem plan to free the human hostages while letting the Medusan refugees stay on Earth. Their scheme? Fulvia and Adam posing as a couple, what could possibly go wrong?
The legendary game show hosted by Derek Hobson where dogs and their owners compete for money and prizes.
Intruders break into the offices of Nemesis and obtain information that puts Richard's life in danger.
When a Nemesis scientist apparently dies of fear in a Haitian hotel, Sharron is despatched to find out what is going on.
Ken is hired by a nightclub owner to discover why he cannot renew his gaming licence, while a has-been comedian causes trouble at Woodcote Park.
The Alphans find that they have travelled back in time to 14th-century Scotland.
The Alphans make contact with a planet of robot humans.

A woman seeking her father enters a seaside town ruled by a blood-weeping cult, uncovering a surreal nightmare as the dead stir and darkness spreads through a community lost to an ancient hunger.
